channel.title: GitHub Trending Changes
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub trending repositories

item.title: unslothai / unsloth
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #3
Unified web UI for training and running open models like Qwen, DeepSeek, and Gemma locally.
Language: Python 975 stars today

item.title: newton-physics / newton
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #4
An open-source, GPU-accelerated physics simulation engine built upon NVIDIA Warp, specifically targeting roboticists and simulation researchers.
Language: Python 20 stars today

item.title: shadps4-emu / shadPS4
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #5
PlayStation 4 emulator for Windows, Linux and macOS written in C++
Language: C++ 683 stars today

item.title: langchain-ai / open-swe
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #6
An Open-Source Asynchronous Coding Agent
Language: Python 454 stars today

item.title: jarrodwatts / claude-hud
item.description:
📈 Rank: #5 → #1 (↑4) | ⭐ Stars: 5,553 → 6,414 (+861)
A Claude Code plugin that shows what's happening - context usage, active tools, running agents, and todo progress
Language: JavaScript 1,040 stars today

item.title: obra / superpowers
item.description:
📉 Rank: #1 → #2 (↓1) | ⭐ Stars: 92,174 → 95,056 (+2882)
An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
Language: Shell 4,091 stars today
